headline: Command Pattern
description: Encapsulates a request as an object, enabling parameterization, queuing, logging, and undo/redo. Commands are first-class objects with execute() and undo() methods.

citation.name: Head First Design Patterns (2nd Edition Updated 2025)
citation.author: Freeman E., Robson E.

citation.name: Behavioral Design Patterns in Cloud-Native Architectures (2025)
citation.author: multiple
